title: nephrodium oligodonton
intro: Nephrodium oligodonton, also known as Oligodonton, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the Osmundaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea. The plant is said to have astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe the digestive tract and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Nephrodium oligodonton is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements and teas.
